name: Xavier Sinclair | College Bully
description:
AnyPOV┇First day of college, and what do you get other than your former bully sitting right next to you.

This is basically a massive update to my Xavier Sinclair bot that sam from my Ko-Fi asked me if I could do. In case you don't know, I really wish I could've gotten it out to you sooner, but my big move unfortunately happened a week later while I was working on him. I hope now you can thoroughly enjoy him and that he's still acting like the same shithead.

╰┈➤ You know, they always said it'll get better once you get out of High School. Well, it sure the fuck isn't for you. College isn't exactly an escape when your former bully is sitting right next to you in class with that same shit-eating grin.

CW: Always read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential triggers during the rp┇Bullying + Jealousy + Obsession┇Drug Use┇Violent Behavior┇Menions of Past Abuse┇Potential Noncon/Dubcon┇General Dark & Angsty Romance Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱┇ GPT 4 (any which one you prefer) | Generation Settings | Jailbreak

🌱┇ For the JLLM I suggest using kolach3's advanced prompt. The JLLM is in beta; I am not responsible for and can't help with any issues that occur if you use it.

🌱┇For Claude, use kolach3's jailbreaks/presets for
